name: Alatri Bros.

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against Alatri Bros.' current restaurant-issued menu and the current restaurant-linked Toast representation reviewed on 2026-07-14.
The current catalog contains 84 unique formulations and 202 source presentations across the official dine-in menu plus Toast's Dinner and Dinner (3PD) channels.
Sixty-two frozen rows represent current formulations; the current sources contain 22 additional formulations omitted from the frozen output.
The four rejected frozen rows are two promotional phrases, the Crostini section heading, and a Shrimp Parmesan description promoted into a duplicate product.
Featured Toast rows repeat products from their real sections and are not counted as additional formulations.
The restaurant-issued site and restaurant-linked Toast menu publish selected fixed ingredient descriptions but no complete item-level allergen matrix or recipes.
Seventy-four current formulations have positive contains signals from fixed text or mandatory named formats; ten have no supported fixed signal.
The official menu states that Alatri offers no guarantee food is completely gluten- or nut-free. That global caution applies to all 84 food formulations as may-contain peanut, tree nut, and gluten.

All 62 real frozen rows underreported the current semantics because none retained the global caution; many also omitted fixed milk, egg, wheat/gluten, fish, shellfish, soy, tree-nut, or mustard signals.
Optional proteins, pizza toppings, meatball additions, gluten-free substitutions, and configurable choices are not promoted into fixed allergens.
The frozen Toast/site merge flattened every product into Italian / Pizza and assigned adjacent item names or categories as variant groups.
It omitted 22 current formulations, promoted four nonproducts, and discarded the restaurant's explicit global gluten/nut caution.
It only partially mapped fixed ingredients, including missing pizza/calzone dough, pasta, bread, dairy, egg, fish, shellfish, soy, and mustard signals.

The correction rebuilds the current channel and section structure, deduplicates channel/featured repetitions, retains 84 formulations with 202 presentations, and separates fixed contains claims from global cross-contact.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Captured and exhaustively reviewed the current restaurant-issued menu: identity, 51 products, six visible sections, descriptions, optional additions, pizza disclaimer, and global gluten/nut caution.

Exhaustively reviewed the current web-accessible Toast representation for Alatri Bros. at 4926 Cordell Avenue: 84 unique formulations and 151 Toast channel presentations across Dinner and Dinner (3PD).
notes: The representation is restaurant-linked vendor evidence and is not promoted to a restaurant-issued allergen matrix.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct command-line capture returned HTTP 403; the current menu remained accessible through the reviewed web representation and stable item URLs.
Found selected fixed descriptions and the restaurant-issued global gluten/nut caution, but no complete matrix, recipes, or allergen-specific item legend.

findings.summary: The frozen catalog flattened current site/Toast sections, fabricated adjacency-based variants, omitted 22 formulations, and retained four promotional, heading, or description artifacts.
findings.resolution: Rebuilt 84 current formulations with 202 official-site and Toast channel presentations, restored all omissions, deduplicated channel repetitions, removed every fabricated variant, and rejected only the four source-proven nonproducts.

findings.summary: Every real frozen row discarded Alatri's restaurant-issued statement that food cannot be guaranteed completely gluten- or nut-free; many also omitted fixed positive ingredients.
findings.resolution: Applied may-contain peanut, tree nut, and gluten to all 84 food formulations as a global cross-contact note, separately mapped 74 positive contains rows, and left optional choices out of fixed claims.

findings.summary: The generic source merge lost current channel, section, alias, configuration, fixed-ingredient, and global-warning semantics.
findings.resolution: Prepared a guarded current-menu manifest correction with exact formulation/presentation counts, official aliases, configurable-choice semantics, global caution separation, and focused invariants.

repairs.summary: Prepared and focused-tested an 84-formulation, 202-presentation Alatri Bros. catalog with 74 fixed-positive rows, ten cross-contact-only rows, all 66 frozen rows reconciled, and every current omission/artifact corrected.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=tmp/restaurant-verification/alatri-isolated.generated.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (isolated copy; verified 84 items, ten canonical categories, 74 fixed-positive rows, ten cross-contact-only rows, the global caution on every item, all sampled additions, artifact removal, and idempotent guard behavior)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 84 formulations, 202 presentations, 23 source sections, 74 fixed-positive rows, and ten cross-contact-only rows.
